violations.text: Packaged single service items for beverages were observed stored in adjacent room in restroom. During time of inspection, adjacent room did not have a door. PIC informed that if establishment chooses to store items for food service in this space a door is required to segregate storage from restroom. Exterior of packaged single service items were sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Per PIC, drain pump for handsink near 3 bay sink is in poor repair, causing the hand sink to be non-operational. System to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
Litter was observed in dumpster area. Area to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
